skills.title: Recognise hand signals in briefing
skills.description: Recognises the hand signals for 'ok', 'problem', 'ear problem', 'low on air', 'surface/end the dive', 'stay with buddy' as well as the audible (or tactile) and visual 'look at me' signals during the briefing.
skills.performanceStandard: Correctly identifies all standard hand signals plus the 'look-at-me' signal.

skills.title: Don and adjust equipment
skills.description: Dons and adjusts equipment, using appropriate lifting techniques.
skills.performanceStandard: Proper lifting technique, gear fully adjusted and secured.

skills.title: Pre-dive Safety Check (BWRAF)
skills.description: Performs a pre-dive safety check.

skills.title: Entry with positive buoyancy
skills.description: Enters the water with the BCD inflated to have positive buoyancy.
skills.performanceStandard: BCD clearly inflated, safe entry without sinking.

skills.title: Check and adjust weighting
skills.description: Checks buoyancy and adjusts weighting.
skills.performanceStandard: Properly weighted: neutral at eye level with empty BCD and half-full tank.

skills.title: Controlled descent with reference
skills.description: Makes a controlled descent to a maximum depth of 12 m / 40 ft, using a descent line or sloping bottom as reference.
skills.performanceStandard: Controlled descent with equalisation; depth ≤ 12 m.

skills.title: Trim check
skills.description: Participates in a trim check.
skills.performanceStandard: Active participation; awareness of trim corrections.

skills.title: Clear a partially flooded mask
skills.description: Clears a partially flooded mask.
skills.performanceStandard: Clears without aborting, maintains breathing control.

skills.title: Recover and clear regulator
skills.description: Recovers and clears the regulator at depth.
skills.performanceStandard: Locates reg underwater, replaces and clears (exhale or purge).

skills.title: Dive site tour
skills.description: Tours the dive site.

skills.title: Signal air supply
skills.description: Signals when remaining air supply is near the agreed reserve, and/or displays remaining pressure in bar/psi.
skills.performanceStandard: Proactive signal on reaching the agreed reserve.

skills.title: Buddy contact within 2 seconds
skills.description: Stays close enough to the buddy to establish physical contact within two seconds.
skills.performanceStandard: Consistent buddy proximity throughout the dive.

skills.title: Controlled ascent rate
skills.description: Ascends no faster than 18 m / 60 ft per minute, maintaining buddy contact. Uses the 5-point method (if Confined Water Dive 3 has been completed).
skills.performanceStandard: Ascent rate ≤ 18 m/min, buddy contact, 5-point ascent.

skills.title: Plan the dive
skills.description: Plans the dive including air supply management / turn pressure, time limits, entries and exits, buddy separation procedures, and basic emergency procedures.

skills.title: Don gear and streamline
skills.description: Dons and adjusts equipment and streamlines it. Uses appropriate lifting technique.

skills.title: Pre-dive Safety Check (BWRAF)
skills.description: Performs a pre-dive safety check.

skills.title: Adjust buoyancy and trim
skills.description: Adjusts buoyancy and trim as necessary.

skills.title: Positive buoyancy at surface
skills.description: Establishes positive buoyancy at the surface, keeps mask on, and breathes from snorkel or regulator.

skills.title: Oral BCD inflation
skills.description: In water too deep to stand, deflates the BCD and then orally inflates it until positive buoyancy is achieved.
skills.performanceStandard: Oral inflation to positive buoyancy without panic.

skills.title: Controlled descent (5-point)
skills.description: Makes a controlled descent to a maximum depth of 12 m / 40 ft using a descent line or sloping bottom as reference. Uses the 5-point method.

skills.title: Neutral buoyancy via inflator
skills.description: Establishes neutral buoyancy by adjusting BCD (or drysuit) air using the inflator.
skills.performanceStandard: Stable hover with sensitive inflator use.

skills.title: Clear a fully flooded mask
skills.description: Clears a fully flooded mask.
skills.performanceStandard: Fully flooded mask cleared in a controlled manner.

skills.title: Stationary air share (both roles)
skills.description: Plays both roles: in a stationary position, one diver signals out-of-air, secures the other diver's alternate air source, and breathes from it; the other diver provides the alternate air source.

skills.title: Ascent using alternate air source
skills.description: Ascends correctly using an alternate air source and establishes positive buoyancy at the surface. Plays the donor or receiver role.
skills.performanceStandard: Correct air-share ascent; surface buoyancy established.

skills.title: Dive site tour
skills.description: Tours the dive site.

skills.title: Avoid environmental contact
skills.description: Avoids contact with sensitive organisms and the bottom, and re-secures any equipment that may have come loose.
skills.performanceStandard: No bottom contact, no contact with marine life.

skills.title: Buddy contact within 2 seconds
skills.description: Stays close enough to the buddy to establish physical contact within two seconds.

skills.title: Estimate air supply (±20 bar)
skills.description: Shows remaining air supply with a maximum deviation of 20 bar / 300 psi without looking at the SPG to check.
skills.performanceStandard: Estimate within ±20 bar without SPG glance.

skills.title: Regular air display
skills.description: Shows remaining air supply at regular intervals agreed during dive planning.

skills.title: Ascent with 5-point and safety stop
skills.description: Ascends no faster than 18 m / 60 ft per minute, maintaining buddy contact. Uses the 5-point method (unless it is an alternate-air-source ascent). Performs a safety stop if possible.

skills.title: Plan the dive
skills.description: Plans the dive.

skills.title: Don gear and streamline
skills.description: Dons and adjusts equipment and streamlines it. Uses appropriate lifting technique.

skills.title: Pre-dive Safety Check (BWRAF)
skills.description: Performs a pre-dive safety check.

skills.title: Adjust buoyancy and trim
skills.description: Adjusts buoyancy and trim as necessary.

skills.title: Positive buoyancy at surface
skills.description: Establishes positive buoyancy at the surface, keeps mask on, and breathes from snorkel or regulator.

skills.title: Descent with visual reference (≤ 18 m)
skills.description: Makes a controlled descent using a visual reference to a maximum depth of 18 m / 60 ft. Uses the 5-point method.

skills.title: Hover via oral BCD inflation
skills.description: Establishes neutral buoyancy and hovers by orally inflating the BCD.
skills.performanceStandard: Stable hover after oral inflation underwater.

skills.title: Mask remove, replace, and clear
skills.description: Removes the mask, replaces it, and clears it.

skills.title: Dive site tour
skills.description: Tours the dive site.

skills.title: Avoid environmental contact
skills.description: Avoids contact with sensitive organisms and the bottom, and re-secures any equipment that may have come loose.
skills.performanceStandard: No bottom contact, no contact with marine life.

skills.title: Buddy contact within 2 seconds
skills.description: Stays close enough to the buddy to establish physical contact within two seconds.

skills.title: Estimate air supply (±20 bar)
skills.description: Shows remaining air supply with a maximum deviation of 20 bar / 300 psi without looking at the SPG to check.
skills.performanceStandard: Estimate within ±20 bar without SPG glance.

skills.title: Regular air display
skills.description: Shows remaining air supply at regular intervals agreed during dive planning.

skills.title: Ascent with 5-point and safety stop
skills.description: Ascends no faster than 18 m / 60 ft per minute, maintaining buddy contact. Uses the 5-point method. Performs a safety stop if possible.

skills.title: Buddy-team planning with slate
skills.description: As a buddy team, plans the dive using the 'PADI Skill Practice and Dive Planning Slate'.
skills.performanceStandard: Complete buddy-team planning using the slate, without instructor help.

skills.title: Don gear and streamline
skills.description: Dons and adjusts equipment and streamlines it. Uses appropriate lifting technique.

skills.title: Pre-dive Safety Check (BWRAF)
skills.description: Performs a pre-dive safety check.

skills.title: Adjust buoyancy and trim
skills.description: Adjusts buoyancy and trim as necessary.

skills.title: Positive buoyancy at surface
skills.description: Establishes positive buoyancy at the surface, keeps mask on, and breathes from snorkel or regulator.

skills.title: Descent without visual reference
skills.description: Descends without a visual reference to a maximum depth of 18 m / 60 ft. Uses the 5-point method.
skills.performanceStandard: Free 5-point descent without line/bottom reference; depth ≤ 18 m.

skills.title: Dive site tour
skills.description: Tours the dive site.

skills.title: Avoid environmental contact
skills.description: Avoids contact with sensitive organisms and the bottom, and re-secures any equipment that may have come loose.
skills.performanceStandard: No bottom contact, no contact with marine life.

skills.title: Buddy contact within 2 seconds
skills.description: Stays close enough to the buddy to establish physical contact within two seconds.

skills.title: Estimate air supply (±20 bar)
skills.description: Shows remaining air supply with a maximum deviation of 20 bar / 300 psi without looking at the SPG to check.
skills.performanceStandard: Estimate within ±20 bar without SPG glance.

skills.title: Plan-based turn and surface signals
skills.description: When diving with the buddy, signals when to turn and when to surface based on the air supply or time limit set during dive planning, and acts accordingly.

skills.title: Ascent with 5-point and safety stop
skills.description: Ascends no faster than 18 m / 60 ft per minute, maintaining buddy contact. Uses the 5-point method. Performs a safety stop.
